$comment: tally screenshot traversal + Tier-2 outcome assertion, copy-free. Source of truth for qa/flows/mobile.yaml (GENERATED — run scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs; never hand-edit the yaml). The home screen is the device-net key screen: top bar, period header, category donut, totals row, and the transaction list all render from the frozen-anchor November 2023 QA seed (src/qa/fixtures.ts), so it exercises layout / safe-area / dark-mode / font-scale across every device cell. The outcome assertion pins that the seed actually loaded: the donut's center 'Spent' sub-label only renders when total expense > 0, and it is always on-screen (dead-center) on every device, unlike a transaction row which virtualizes below the fold.

survival.$comment: T4 chaos net — state-survival subflow (compiles to qa/flows/state-survival.yaml; full profile + nightly, NOT per-PR). Core mutating action = re-categorize a seeded transaction (edit qa-tx-3 'Weekly shop' from Groceries to Travel — a category no seed row uses, so it's a distinctive on-home marker). Editing preserves occurredAt, so the row stays in the frozen Nov 2023 period and is visible on home (a freshly-added tx would fall in the real-today month, off the frozen view). Then REAL process death (killApp on Android / stopApp on iOS), then relaunch keeping state. Intent oracle: the row still reads 'Travel' after the kill. The leading assertNot proves Travel wasn't already on home. scrollUntilVisible guards the row (day-03 tx sits low in a date-sorted list) and the Travel tile (low in the category grid).
